name: profile-runtime
description: Profile-aware eval cases for session, tool policy, and structured output checks.

cases.name: general-assistant-readme-summary
cases.prompt: Call file_list on the repository root, then summarize this repository in Chinese and mention happyagent.

cases.name: career-copilot-structured-report
cases.prompt: Read README.md and return a JSON object with keys summary, match_report, rewrite_plan, project_gap_analysis. Keep every field grounded in the repository evidence you inspected.
